prompts: /plan "in the apps/plugin project, We need to update the posting options to include a super long url for the 'home-search-ca' site as the base url for the search we will scrape from. So we need to load that specific url, instead of navigating to the standard search url for 'home-search-ca' and then apply any extra filters'. Ideally give me a drop-zone / input field to drag a url link into or some text."
